A '''skirmish''' over [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] occurred when [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Flight]] pilot [[Rhys Dallows]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Vana Sage]], [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Reti]], and [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] pirate [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] raided a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] carrying supplies for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

==Prelude==
Having joined forces with the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] pilot [[Rhys Dallows]] led them to his home planet to fight the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]].

==The battle==
The allied pilots arrived over Naboo and discovered a convoy of [[Trade Federation Superfreighter]]s loaded with munitions. The pilots were engaged by [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture'' droid starfighters]], and the raiders were forced to defend themselves. Almost overwhelmed, Reti infiltrated [[Unidentified Trade Federation Superfreighter (Naboo)|one of the freighters]] after [[Vana Sage]] disabled it. The [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] was able to program a wing of [[Scarab-class starfighter/Legends|''Scarab''-class droid starfighters]] to assist the raiders. The [[Droid/Legends|droids]] responded to targeting information forwarded to them by Sage.

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)}}
Three [[Lupus-class missile frigate|''Lupus''-class missile frigates]] arrived to destroy the freighter that Reti had infiltrated, but were quickly held off and destroyed by the raiders. Droid [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] launched, but they were also destroyed by the raiders. More fighters engaged the raiders, but eventually the entire convoy was destroyed, including the captured freighter, denying the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Army]] its supplies.
{{Endgame}}

==Aftermath==
Having dealt with the convoy, the pilots went down to the surface. Dallows and Reti would [[Mission in the Naboo canyon|deliver]] supplies to the resistance while Nym engaged the Droid Army head-on.

==Behind the scenes==
This article includes information from the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]. This particular mission, "The New Resistance," would receive an off-hand reference in the [[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter|sequel]]. Destroying the Missile Frigates and the escape pods are bonus objectives; this article assumes 100% completion.
